win_condition: After final domino placement, highest total kingdom score wins.
tiebreaker: Largest single territory by square count; if still tied, most total crowns; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Territory Squares
categories.description: Count squares in each connected terrain territory.

categories.label: Territory Crowns
categories.description: Count crowns in each territory; territory score is squares multiplied by crowns.
